summary: Redis Integration for Dynamic Risk Engine testing complete. Backend: 21/21 tests passed (100%). Frontend: City Heatmap and Safety Score pages verified working with Redis-cached data. Redis running with all expected namespaced keys and correct TTLs.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/system/cache-status returns Redis connection info with status='connected', memory usage, keys count, connected clients - VERIFIED
GET /api/operator/city-heatmap/live returns 622 cells with weight_profile from Redis cache - VERIFIED
GET /api/operator/city-heatmap/delta returns delta data from Redis with escalated/de_escalated counts - VERIFIED
GET /api/operator/city-heatmap/timeline returns timeline snapshots (4 entries) from Redis - VERIFIED
GET /api/safety-score/location returns score with percentile ranking (uses Redis-cached grid scores) - VERIFIED
POST /api/safety-score/route returns route score with risk_zones_crossed, sample_points - VERIFIED
GET /api/guardian/sessions/active returns sessions cached in Redis with 120s TTL - VERIFIED
POST /api/guardian/start creates session and invalidates Redis session cache - VERIFIED
POST /api/guardian/stop ends session and invalidates Redis session cache - VERIFIED
Redis keys properly namespaced: Nagarik:heatmap:live, Nagarik:heatmap:delta, Nagarik:heatmap:timeline, Nagarik:heatmap:meta, Nagarik:safety_score:grid, Nagarik:sessions:active - VERIFIED
Redis TTLs correct: heatmap keys ~600s, sessions ~120s - VERIFIED via redis-cli
Auth endpoints working: POST /api/auth/login for both operator and guardian - VERIFIED
Backend logs show no Redis errors - VERIFIED
redis_service.py implements connection pooling (max 50 connections), JSON helpers, namespaced keys - CODE REVIEWED
dynamic_risk_engine.py uses Redis primary with in-memory fallback for get_live_heatmap(), get_heatmap_delta(), get_heatmap_timeline() - CODE REVIEWED
location_safety_score_engine.py uses Redis safety_score:grid cache for percentile ranking - CODE REVIEWED
guardian_mode_engine.py caches active sessions with 120s TTL and invalidates on start/stop - CODE REVIEWED

success_rate.frontend: 100% (City Heatmap and Safety Score verified working)

seed_data_creation: Using existing data from previous phases - 622 heatmap cells, 4 timeline snapshots
context_for_next_testing_agent: Redis integration complete. Redis running at redis://localhost:6379. All heatmap data served from Redis primary cache with in-memory fallback. Keys: Nagarik:heatmap:* (TTL 600s), Nagarik:safety_score:grid (TTL 600s), Nagarik:sessions:active (TTL 120s). Dynamic Risk Scheduler runs every 5 minutes and refreshes all Redis keys. Safety score percentile uses Redis-cached grid scores. Guardian session start/stop invalidates sessions cache.

frontend_ui_tests: Login page loads with Nagarik branding - SUCCESS
Operator login with operator@Nagarik.com / operator123 - SUCCESS
City Heatmap page shows 'Live heatmap: 622 cells, 0 critical' - SUCCESS
City Heatmap visualization renders with risk intensity gradient - SUCCESS
8 AI signal filters displayed (Composite, Forecast, Hotspot, Trend, Activity, Patrol, Environment, Sessions, Anomaly) - SUCCESS
Safety Score page loads with tabs and map - SUCCESS

verified_features: Redis connection with 50 max connection pool
Fallback to in-memory cache when Redis unavailable
Heatmap live data caching with 600s TTL
Heatmap delta caching for change detection
Safety score grid caching for percentile ranking
Active guardian sessions caching with 120s TTL
